CONTENT.Club career: Leweling made his professional debut for Greuther Fürth in the 2. Bundesliga on 28 July 2019, coming on as a substitute in the 85th minute for Tobias Mohr in the home match against Erzgebirge Aue, which finished as a 0–2 loss.On 17 May 2022, it was confirmed that Leweling would join Bundesliga side Union Berlin for the 2022–23 season.On 13 July 2023, Leweling moved on loan to VfB Stuttgart. On 19 May 2024, he joined Stuttgart permanently and signed a contract until June 2028.
CONTENT.External links: Jamie Leweling at DFB (also available in German)Jamie Leweling at kicker (in German)
CONTENT.International career: Born in Germany, Leweling is of Ghanaian descent. He was called up to represent the Ghana national football team in October 2020.

SUMMARY: Jamie Leweling (born 26 February 2001) is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder, right winger  or forward for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart.
